title: Enter your new database username and password, then click Create Database User.

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To manage IP Access List entries, you must have
[Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) or [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to
the project.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
*Estimated completion time: 2 minutes*

The Connect to your\_data\_federation\_name menu appears.

The menu expands to show the Add a connection IP address
modal.

Once finished, click the Close button to finish the configuration
or the Choose connection method to connect your federated database instance to an
integration.
